MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Vacated

Application For Order Releasing Bond; Declaration
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Wolford, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-265-2897), for Nasir Sheikh, Plaintiff and moving party.
No appearance by Defendant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF NASIR SHEIKH's Application For Order Releasing Bond is GRANTED. Neither party will be injured by the release of the bond as the case has settled. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Jason N. Wolford, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-265-2897), for Nasir Sheikh, Plaintiff and moving party.

Christopher Salaysay, (415-470-9018) specially appearing for Salim Rachi, Defendant and opposing party.
